intro: Humata nervosa, also known as the Nerve Stem or Nerve Fern, is a species of fern in the family Arecaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic properties, which may aid in managing conditions such as arthritis, high blood pressure, and type 2 diabetes.
